# pfsense_dnsresolver_configfile (Data Source)

Retrieves a single DNS resolver [config file](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/services/dns/resolver.html) by name. Config files contain custom Unbound configuration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of config file.

### Read-Only

- `content` (String) Contents of file. Must specify Unbound clause(s). Comments start with `#` and last to the end of line.
